failures.description: The agent invented an unsupported answer at synthesis time, changing the grounded tool result from 13 available Mechanical Keyboard options to 20 and adding a fabricated record reference.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the count of available Mechanical Keyboard options. The plan and tool invocation were correct, and the ProductCatalogSearch tool returned a grounded result of count=13. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming there are 20 options and cited record 0000000000. Both the count 20 and the record id are absent from the tool output and contradict the available evidence. This fabricated answer was not corrected later; the Evaluator approved it despite noting the tool result had 13 items.
